# steam-mcp — full LLM corpus (v0.2.0)

See README.md for user-facing documentation.

## Portmanteau surface

- steam_profile: own, summaries, friends, resolve_vanity
- steam_library: owned, recent, details, wishlist
- steam_stats: achievements, global_percentages, players, leaderboards
- steam_store: news, search, reviews
- steam_workshop: query, item_details
- steam_system: status, steamcmd_status
- steam_help, agentic_steam_workflow, show_steam_status_card, show_library_card, show_store_search_card

## Auth

STEAM_API_KEY, STEAM_ID, STEAMCMD_PATH, BACKEND_PORT=11020, FRONTEND_PORT=11021

## Skill

src/steam_mcp/skills/steam-mcp/SKILL.md

## Fleet

mcp-central-docs/projects/steam-mcp/README.md
operations/WEBAPP_PORTS.md ports 11020/11021
